lines.en: Still here? I thought I was the only one.
lines.zh: 还在？我以为只有我一个人。

lines.en: Same here. This report is due tomorrow morning.
lines.zh: 我也是。这份报告明早要交。

lines.en: I know the feeling. I have been working on it since 5 PM.
lines.zh: 我懂。我从下午五点就开始弄了。

lines.en: No. Want to order some takeout together?
No problem. We can finish this faster if we work together.
lines.zh: 不客气。我们一起做会更快完成。

lines.en: Deal. Let us get it done and go home.
lines.zh: 一言为定。做完早点回家。
